summary: Iteration 9 — validated video player modal, map provider toggle w/ localStorage persistence, and geo_cache MongoDB caching. All backend + frontend flows working.
passed: GET /api/places returns list; Bar Basso id fetched
POST /api/enrich/{Manteigaria id} populates latitude/longitude, formatted_address, and 3 real YouTube videos
db.geo_cache went from 0 → 1 entry (key: 'manteigaria porto') after first enrich
Second enrich completes quickly (~0.75s) with lat still returned — cache hit path works
GET /api/places/{Bar Basso} returns latitude and videos (persisted)
Default map provider is OSM (openstreetmap.org/export/embed) when no localStorage
Clicking data-testid='map-provider-google' switches iframe src to google.com/maps?q=lat,lon
Clicking data-testid='map-provider-osm' switches back to OSM
Clicking data-testid='video-source-0' opens data-testid='video-player-modal' with youtube-nocookie.com/embed/{video_id}?autoplay=1&rel=0 iframe
Real YouTube videos rendering on Bar Basso (Italian creator content, correct channels/thumbnails)
